description: Human infra status auto-check at session start
current_process: Agent manually reads HUMAN_INFRA_CHECKLIST.md and compares with prior session
proposed_automation: Python script that reads checklist md and outputs changed/unchanged items since last check

description: Deduplication of alpha entries before staging
current_process: Manual grep of source_url in ALPHA_STAGING.csv before adding
proposed_automation: Extend organize_alpha.py to run as pre-commit hook checking new entries against existing source_urls

description: Auto-generate SESSION_HANDOFF.md from CLAUDE.md session logs
current_process: Manual update (often skipped leading to stale handoff)
proposed_automation: Python script parses CLAUDE.md session log section and generates current SESSION_HANDOFF.md

description: Detect stale files (not modified in 30+ days) that are referenced in CLAUDE.md
current_process: No current process. Stale files silently waste context.
proposed_automation: Python script comparing file mtime with CLAUDE.md references. Flag stale files.

description: Detect when new files duplicate existing content
current_process: No current process. Agents create new files without checking.
proposed_automation: Pre-write hook that checks content similarity against existing OPS/ files using simple text hashing

description: Auto-backtest new alpha entries on staging
proposed_automation: n8n workflow triggers backtest_alpha.py when ALPHA_STAGING.csv is modified

description: Auto-check generated content against copy-style.md rules
current_process: Manual review of each content piece
proposed_automation: Python script that checks for banned words (em dashes and AI vocabulary) and flags violations

description: Auto-warn when approaching platform automation limits
proposed_automation: Tracking CSV that logs actions per platform per day. Script warns at 80% of safe limits.
n8n workflow pulls from Gumroad API + RevenueCat API + Stripe API daily

description: Auto-generate daily summary from mega ralph output
current_process: Manual reading of progress.md and activity.log
proposed_automation: Python script parses ralph output files and generates daily summary email/file
One-time manual merge. Then archive old files.

description: Auto-schedule approved content to posting queue
current_process: Manual copy from QA queue to posting_queue.csv
proposed_automation: n8n workflow moves APPROVED items from QA queue to posting schedule

description: Auto-monitor competitor pricing and features weekly
proposed_automation: Playwright script scrapes competitor app store pages weekly. Diffs against previous scan.
